shoppinglist.languagePrompt: First thin’s first, pick ya language and ya home screen so we can get crackin’ with Murmli.
shoppinglist.welcome:
Welcome to Murmli, ya wicked smaht app for grub, shoppin’, and wicked good health.

 This app uses AI to make translatin’ and pickin’ recipes a breeze. Ya can even whip up ya own recipes and toss ‘em straight onto the shoppin’ list to save ya some wicked time.
shoppinglist.quickGuide:
Just type what ya need in the box, and Murmli’s AI will chuck it right on the list.

 Everythin’ gets sorted by aisle in the supahmarket so ya ain’t walkin’ in circles. Once it’s on there, click it to find somethin’ else if they’re outta stock.
shoppinglist.options: Find more wicked features like sharin’ or sortin’ in the menu up in the right kornah. Share the list with ya spouse or ya roommates so ya can shop togethah. Ya can stop sharin’ whenever ya feel like it.

planner.welcome: Tell us how many folks ya feedin’ and how many meals ya want down below. Type in exactly what ya want—like if ya lookin’ for veggie stuff for runnin’—and the AI will figure it out for ya.
planner.options:
Recipes are gonna show up right heah. 
Give it a thumbs up if it looks wicked good, or a thumbs down if it’s garbage. 

The system gets smahtah the more ya use it.
planner.shoppinglist:
Once ya picked enough meals, ya go straight to the shoppin’ list. It’s got everythin’ ya need. 

 Look undah 'Recipes' to find ya choices and the directions. Ya can rate ‘em theah too.

recipes.overview: Heah’s the whole spread: your shoppin’ list recipes, ya own creations, and ya favorites. Just click ‘em to open ‘em up.
recipes.create: Hit that plus sign up top to make ya own recipes. Type in ya idea, the AI builds it, and ya can even snap a pitcha of what’s in ya fridge.
recipes.addToList: If ya wanna add one of ya own or a favorite to the list, open it up and hit those three dots in the kornah.

tracker.overview:
Just write down what ya ate. 

Use regular talk like 'a bowl of pasta' or name the brand or the exact calories—whatever floats ya boat.
tracker.calorieGoal:
Set ya own goal or let us figuah it out. 

Put in ya stats once and we’ll do the math for ya.
tracker.activityTracking: Log ya workouts too, like 'runnin’ for twenty minutes.' We’ll tell ya how much extra grub ya can eat after workin’ ya tail off.

setup.aboutApp: This thing was built privatly to make dealin’ with shoppin’ and cookin’ a whole lot easiah.

tips.printPdf: Wanna print it? Hit the dots bottom right for a PDF.

tips.feedbackPlanner: Recipe tastes like chalk? Open it and tell us off in the menu.

createRecipeDialog.title: Make a Recipe
createRecipeDialog.text:
Describe ya grub. Don't skip the details! What's gotta be in it? What's gross? The more ya say, the bettah it gets.

It takes about 2-3 minutes to cook up in the app. 

Add a pitcha too—from ya phone or snap one now. Fridge content, a piece of broccoli, whatever.
createRecipeDialog.label: Describe the grub
createRecipeDialog.generatingText: Cheffing it up. Wait two minutes and find it in 'My own stuff'.

recipes.addIngreditensInfo: Add everythin' for this recipe to ya shoppin' list?

history.title: Calries from the last ten days, kid

trainingPlans.title: Workout Plans

step1.title: Make a plan
step1.content: Make it ya own. Describe what ya want, why ya trainin', wheah ya doin' it, how many times a week, and how hahd ya gonna go.

step2.title: Fix a plan
step2.content: If it ain't right, just tell me. Use regular talk to say what needs changin' and I'll update it.

step3.title: Get husslin'
step3.content: Hit the clock when it's on. Log every set—weights, reps, or how long. Send it to the countah at the end to see the burn.

trainingPlans.voiceRecordingInfo: Record ya plan ideas. Saved on the phone until ya send it. Toss it if it's junk.
trainingPlans.createPlanInstructions:
Tell me everythin': What ya hittin'? Gym or pahk? How many days? How hahd?

Examples:
'Gonna hit the gym four times a week, focusing on uppah body. I'm already in decent shape.'

'My back hurts on the left side by the shouldah. Gimme some moves for once a week to fix my posture and dump the pain.'

The more deets, the bettah the plan.
trainingPlans.subtitle: Build and manage ya workouts heah.
trainingPlans.confirmDeletePlan: Ya really wanna chuck this workout?
trainingPlans.continuePlanDescription: Build on this plan. Add new stuff if ya want.
trainingPlans.askDialog: Ask about this specific plan. I'll see ya last ten logs.
trainingPlans.noPlansInfo: Nothin' heah. Hit the plus button and get movin'.

activateDialog.title: Start it up
activateDialog.msg: When ya start, we set the date. Then ya see what week ya on. Ready?

finishDialog.title: Done-zo
finishDialog.msg: Endin' it resets the date and ya progress. Ya done?

trainingPlans.processingMessage: Makin' the plan now. I'll holla when it's ready.

publicRecipe.downloadDescription: Make and share ya own grub with the Murmli app!

training.title: Workout Log
training.noPlan: Nothin' planned for today or the plan's empty.

appRating.title: You diggin' Murmli, kid?
appRating.description: Murmli is wicked free and open-source. I don't got no budget for commercial spots and wicked expensive ads, so stashin' a review in the store helps a ton of wicked smaht people find this thing. If you think the app is wicked awesome, I'd be wicked happy if you left a l'il rating!
